title: Wisdom of Sea and Sky (A4) release: Card list, Events, Solo Battles
game_updates:
Trade tokens are exchangeable for Pack Hourglasses and Shinedust. They will no longer be used to trade cards. Instead, for trades involving cards of rarity  and     


, Shinedust will be used. More information on our trading guide here.
A wishlist feature is now available in "My cards".
Cards from Eevee Grove (A3b) become available for trading.
